page: Microsoft Azure L80s_v4 is a storage-optimized virtual machine from the Lsv4 family, powered by the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features an Intel Xeon 8573C processor with 80 vCPUs, corresponding to 40 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled, running at a clock speed of 4.2 GHz. The x86_64 architecture is supported by a 260 MB L3 cache and advanced instruction sets, including Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions and Advanced Vector Extensions, which accelerate vector and matrix operations.

This instance is equipped with 640.0 GB of system memory, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core. For storage-heavy workloads, the L80s_v4 includes 19,199 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable. This high-capacity local storage configuration makes it highly suitable for applications requiring rapid access to large datasets without relying solely on network-attached storage.

Benchmark data highlights the strong multi-core capabilities of the L80s_v4, with Geekbench multi-core scores placing it in the top 10% tier. It demonstrates high memory bandwidth, reaching 223.47 GB/sec for large block read-only operations. Database performance is also notable, with Redis SET operations achieving 91.92 million operations per second and static web serving throughput reaching a top-tier 105.75 GB/sec.

Given its high resource density, the L80s_v4 offers strong qualitative cost efficiency for large-scale, I/O-intensive deployments by consolidating compute, massive memory, and local storage into a single node. This server is optimized for large relational databases, NoSQL platforms, high-throughput web serving, and data-intensive workloads such as indexing and caching.
description: Microsoft Azure L80s_v4 is a storage-optimized virtual machine from the Lsv4 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It is powered by an Intel Xeon 8573C x86_64 processor with 80 vCPUs, 40 physical cores, and a 4.2 GHz clock speed, supported by a 260 MB L3 cache and AMX/AVX-512 instruction sets. The hardware profile includes 640.0 GB of RAM and a substantial 19,199 GB of local storage. In benchmarks, the L80s_v4 delivers top-tier performance in multi-core processing and static web serving, alongside strong database and memory bandwidth results. This high-density configuration provides excellent qualitative cost efficiency for data-intensive applications by minimizing network storage bottlenecks. It is highly suited for large-scale databases, high-throughput web serving, and caching workloads.
og_description: Microsoft Azure L80s_v4 is an Lsv4-family virtual machine featuring 80 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 640 GB RAM, and 19,199 GB of local storage, optimized for high-throughput database and storage-heavy workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure L80s_v4 is an Lsv4 virtual machine with 80 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 640 GB RAM, and 19,199 GB of local storage for database workloads.
tagline: A high-capacity storage and memory-optimized server featuring eighty Intel Xeon vCPUs and over nineteen terabytes of local storage for demanding database workloads.
bullet_points: Intel Xeon 8573C processor with 80 vCPUs and 4.2 GHz clock speed
640.0 GB of system memory and 19,199 GB of local storage
Top-tier multi-core CPU and static web serving benchmark performance
Intel AMX and AVX-512 instruction support for advanced vector processing
Optimized for large-scale databases, caching, and high-throughput web applications
